html:
Exclusive to:  

Scales are a rare item in Reign of Giants. They are dropped by the Summer Giant, Dragonfly. Scales are used to craft fire-resistant items: the Scalemail, which grants wearer immunity to fire damage, and the fire-proof container, the Scaled Chest.

Downloadable Content

Scales are also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, the Dragonfly is not present. Instead, Scales can be bought for 30 Oincs at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium in the Pig City.

–Wolfgang

–Wendy
“FLAME-TREATED BODY PLATING”
–WX-78
“Scales from an insect? Unheard of!”
–Wickerbottom
“I still don't believe in dragons.”
–Woodie
“Fiery.”
–Maxwell
“The light refraction is quite extraordinary.”
–Wagstaff
“Mystical scales.”
–Wigfrid
“They don't weigh much for scales.”
–Webber
“I need a suit of these, immediately.”
–Walani
“Hot to the touch!”
–Warly
“'Tis a wondrous treasure.”
–Woodlegs
“IT STOP'TH FWOOSHINGS”
–Wilba
“Fiery skin”
–Wormwood
“What am I supposed to do with some old skin?”
–Wheeler
“Showy.”
–Winona
“I prefer fur to scales.”
–Wortox
“Pretty...”
–Wurt
“Was she a bug or a lizard?”
–Walter
“Fireproof material has served me well in the past. And future, come to think of it.”
–Wanda
Scales are a rare item in Reign of Giants. They are dropped by the Summer Giant, Dragonfly. Scales are used to craft fire-resistant items: the Scalemail, which grants wearer immunity to fire damage, and the fire-proof container, the Scaled Chest.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
Scales are also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, the Dragonfly is not present. Instead, Scales can be bought for 30 Oincs at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium in the Pig City.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cân là một vật phẩm hiếm trong Reign of Giants. Chúng bị rơi ra bởi Người khổng lồ mùa hè, Chuồn chuồn. Cân được sử dụng để chế tạo các vật phẩm chống cháy: Thư vảy, giúp người đeo có khả năng miễn nhiễm với sát thương do lửa và hộp đựng chống cháy, Rương vảy.

'''Scales''' are a rare item in ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]''. They are dropped by the [[Summer]] Giant, [[Dragonfly]]. Scales are used to craft fire-resistant items: the [[Scalemail]], which grants wearer immunity to fire damage, and the fire-proof container, the [[Scaled Chest]].

=={{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
Scales are also included in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, however, the Dragonfly is not present. Instead, Scales can be bought for 30 [[Oinc]]s at [['The Sty' Oddities Emporium]] in the [[Pig City]].
